criteria.notes: Extensively uses ADS components: Table, Field, Label, Select, TextInput, Radio, DateInput, Checkbox, TextArea, Badge, DescriptionList, Button, Column, FieldSet, etc.
Imports @amsterdam/design-system-tokens/dist/index.css and uses --ams-* custom properties like --ams-color-page-background and --ams-color-interactive in CSS.
Imports @amsterdam/design-system-tokens/dist/compact.css in main.tsx to enable compact mode.
PageFooter component is used with PageFooter.Menu and PageFooter.MenuLink, but PageHeader is NOT used — header is a custom HTML element with Logo.
Uses proper ADS composition: Field (with invalid prop), Label, ErrorMessage, FieldSet, Hint, and InvalidFormAlert throughout the wizard.
Dashboard uses ADS Table with Table.Header, Table.Row, Table.HeaderCell, Table.Body, and Table.Cell with proper aria-label.
No banned libraries present; only ADS, React, and React Router in dependencies.
4-step wizard with Badge-based step indicator showing current step, Vorige/Volgende navigation, and per-step validation gating.
Per-field validation with inline ErrorMessage components and Field invalid prop; validates name, email format, phone, all required fields across 3 steps.
Uses ADS InvalidFormAlert component with error links pointing to field IDs, shown at top of form on failed step submission.
All input types present: TextInput (text), Select (dropdown), Radio (radio group), DateInput (date), Checkbox, and TextArea.
Step 4 renders read-only DescriptionList with Aanvrager, Locatie, and Vergunning sections showing all entered data plus submit button.
All UI text in Dutch: headings, labels, buttons, navigation, placeholder texts, and footer links.
Clear B1-level active voice: 'Vul uw naam in', 'Kies een type vergunning', 'Controleer of de gegevens kloppen voordat u de aanvraag verstuurt'.
Dutch status labels (Ingediend, In behandeling, Goedgekeurd, Afgewezen) and Dutch error messages throughout the form.
BrowserRouter in main.tsx with three Routes: / (Dashboard), /nieuw (NewPermitWizard), /zaak/:id (PermitDetail).
strict: true added to both tsconfig.app.json and tsconfig.node.json; build succeeds with tsc -b && vite build.
